# Clínica Hispana La Caridad — Houston, TX

## About
Clínica Hispana La Caridad is a Hispanic medical clinic located in Houston, Texas. We provide professional medical care 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community, with or without insurance, and no appointment needed.

## Location
- Address: 2973 Bingle Rd, Houston, TX 77055
- Phone: (682) 259-7190
- Email: chlacaridad@gmail.com

## Hours
- Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- Last patient accepted: 5:30 PM

## Services
We offer comprehensive medical services including:
- Family Medicine (Medicina Familiar)
- Immigration Medical Exams (I-693) with USCIS-certified Civil Surgeons
- STD Testing and Treatment
- Urology Services
- Chronic Disease Management (Diabetes, Hypertension, Thyroid)
- Clinical Laboratory with same-day results
- Ultrasound
- Gynecology Services
- Family Planning
- Contraceptive Injections
- Contraceptive Implant Removal
- Electrocardiogram (EKG)
- Respiratory Disease Treatment
- Urinary Tract Infection Treatment
- Vaginal Infection Treatment
- DOT Medical Exams for CDL drivers
- General Physical Exams
- Muscle and Joint Pain Treatment

## Languages
- Spanish (primary)
- English

## Insurance
We accept most insurance plans. Uninsured patients are welcome with affordable cash pricing.

## Social Media
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/clinicalacaridadhoustontx
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/clinicalacaridadhouston

## Website
https://www.chlacaridad.com

## Contact
For appointments or questions, call (682) 259-7190 or visit our clinic. Walk-ins welcome.
